calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Aug-08-2012 Set For Trial On Aug-08-12 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 608

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-08-2012 Continued To Aug-08-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-09-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Bruce Helmberger and Chloe Bowen for Defendant/Appellant Glen Canyon Properties,
Christopher Pfeifer Plaintiff/Respondent.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Bruce Helmberger testifies on behalf of Glen Canyon Properties. The following evidence is introduced:
Exhibit 1 - Email string from Chloe Bowen to Christian Aggerwal dated 2/2/12
Exhibit 2 - Email string from Chloe Bowen to Christian Aggerwal dated 1/12/12
Exhibit 3 - Topic from San Francisco Rent Board Website
Exhibit 4 - Printouts from craigslist apartment listings
Exhibit 5 - Email string from Chloe Bowen to Christian Aggerwal dated 2/29/12

Christopher Pfeifer testifies on his own behalf. The following evidence is introduced:
Exhibit A - Residential Rental Agreement

Chloe Bowen testifies on behalf of Glen Canyon Properties.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge Curtis E.A. Karnow, Clerk Danial Lemire, NOT reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jun-05-2012 Judgment Entered

DEFENDANT'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jun-05-2012 Judgment Entered
